eval.question: Show me battery state of charge and voltage for site 151734 over the last hour.
eval.expected_behavior: - Produces a time-series summary with two series (SOC "bs" and Voltage "bv"). - Reports the point counts per series (up to ~60 for a 1h window). - Quotes labels from `records.meta` when available (e.g., "Battery SOC (`bs`)").
